message:
fix: Fix Linux CI subprocess panic by adding explicit env_map

Update metal0 submodule with fix for Linux ChildProcess panic.
Remove dangerouslyIgnoreUnhandledErrors workaround from vitest.config.js
since root cause is now fixed.

files.patch:
@@ -4,9 +4,6 @@ export default defineConfig({
   test: {
     globals: true,
     testTimeout: 30000,
-    // Ignore unhandled errors from native binding cleanup on Linux
-    // The errors occur after tests complete when workers exit
-    dangerouslyIgnoreUnhandledErrors: true,
     include: ['test/**/*.spec.js', 'test/**/*.test.js'],
     exclude: [
       'test/basic.test.js',
